items.question_en: Which RE tasks are associated with more than one distinct NLP task type?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?reTask ?reTaskLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?nlpTaskType) AS ?nlpTaskTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181002 ?reTask ;
                orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask .
  ?nlpTask orkgp:P181004 ?nlpTaskType .
  OPTIONAL { ?reTask rdfs:label ?reTaskLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?reTask ?reTaskLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?nlpTaskType) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?nlpTaskTypeCount) ?reTaskLabel
items.notes: Uses grouping and HAVING over RE-task-to-NLP-task-type coverage rather than a simple lookup.

items.question_en: Which papers report an NLP task with the same output type but at least two different inputs?
items.notes: Compares multiple input values within the same NLP task and ties them to one shared output type.

items.question_en: Which papers report a translation mapping cardinality but neither a classification label nor an extracted element?
items.notes: Uses nested output properties and dual absence constraints to target translation-oriented reporting only.

items.question_en: For each venue, which NLP task output types are reported?
items.notes: Combines the paper-level venue anchor with nested NLP task output traversal.

items.question_en: Do any papers report both a classification label and a translation mapping cardinality in the same NLP task output?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

ASK {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask .
  ?nlpTask orkgp:P181006 ?taskOutput .
  ?taskOutput orkgp:P181008 ?classificationLabel ;
              orkgp:P181010 ?mappingCardinality .
}
items.notes: Boolean existence check over two nested output annotations within the same task-output node.

items.question_en: Which papers report a venue, an NLP dataset, and an implemented approach, but no annotation process?
items.notes: Captures a contribution-content profile by combining three reported regions and one missing region.

items.question_en: Which publication years contain papers that report both an annotation process and an evaluation?
items.notes: Uses paper year as the grouping axis for a two-region contribution-content co-occurrence.

items.question_en: Which venues contain papers that report both an NLP dataset and an evaluation, and how many such papers are there per venue?
items.notes: Aggregates complete contribution bundles by venue instead of listing papers individually.

items.question_en: Which papers report both a dataset URL and a release URL?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel ?datasetUrl ?releaseUrl
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?datasetLocation .
  ?datasetLocation orkgp:P1003 ?datasetUrl .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?releaseUrl .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel ?datasetUrl ?releaseUrl
items.notes: Bridges the dataset and implementation sides of the same paper via two different URL-bearing substructures.

items.question_en: Which venues have at least two papers that report both an RE task and an evaluation metric, and which papers are they?
items.notes: Compares venue-level contribution density for a specific cross-region evidence profile.

items.question_en: Which papers report both a methodology license type and a release format for the implemented approach?
items.notes: Stays inside the implemented-approach subtree and couples licensing with release packaging.

items.question_en: Which papers report a running requirement together with a dependency but without any documentation type?
items.notes: Applies an absence constraint within the methodology subtree rather than across top-level sections.

items.question_en: Which approach types are accompanied by more than one distinct algorithm?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?approachType ?approachTypeLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?algorithm) AS ?algorithmCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P5043 ?approachType ;
                       orkgp:P58069 ?algorithm .
  OPTIONAL { ?approachType rdfs:label ?approachTypeLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?approachType ?approachTypeLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?algorithm) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?algorithmCount) ?approachTypeLabel
items.notes: Uses type-level aggregation to capture methodological diversity beyond single paper retrieval.

items.question_en: Which papers report at least two different documentation types for the same implemented approach?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?documentationType) AS ?documentationTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P41835 ?documentationType .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?documentationType) >= 2)
ORDER BY DESC(?documentationTypeCount) ?paperLabel
items.notes: Counts repeated documentation evidence within one implementation node.

items.question_en: Which papers report both an approach type and a release location type?
items.notes: Connects core methodological characterization to release-distribution metadata.

items.question_en: Which release location types are used together with which release formats?
items.notes: Enumerates paired release properties rather than paper-level implementation records.

items.question_en: Do any papers report both a methodology license type and a release URL for the same implemented approach?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

ASK {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType ;
                       orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?releaseUrl .
}
items.notes: Checks same-node co-occurrence between approach licensing and concrete release publication.

items.question_en: Which papers report a dependency and a documentation type, but no release information at all?
items.notes: Targets documented and dependent implementations whose release subtree is entirely absent.

items.question_en: Which papers report more than one distinct running requirement for the same implemented approach?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?runningRequirement) AS ?runningRequirementCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P181047 ?runningRequirement .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?runningRequirement) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?runningRequirementCount) ?paperLabel
items.notes: Measures methodological operational complexity via repeated running requirements.

items.question_en: Which papers report an NLP data production time together with an NLP data abstraction level?
items.notes: Pairs temporal provenance of the data with abstraction-level characterization in the dataset subtree.

items.question_en: Which papers report more than one distinct NLP data format for the same dataset?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataFormat) AS ?dataFormatCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181023 ?dataFormat .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataFormat) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?dataFormatCount) ?paperLabel
items.notes: Aggregates dataset-format multiplicity instead of merely listing which formats exist.

items.question_en: Which papers report both a data source domain and a natural language for the same dataset?
items.notes: Links source-domain provenance to the linguistic characterization of the same dataset.

items.question_en: Which papers report public availability together with a dataset URL but without a dataset license type?
items.notes: Uses the dataset license subtemplate to model a precise missing-information case.

items.question_en: Which dataset location types are reported together with which public availability values?
items.notes: Pairs dataset-accessibility and storage-location metadata without collapsing to paper-level rows.

items.question_en: Which papers report shared material together with guideline availability?
items.notes: Targets less-used annotation-support properties rather than core dataset descriptors.

items.question_en: Which papers report a fatigue mitigation technique together with an annotator assignment?
items.notes: Combines two different branches of the annotation-process subtree in one query.

items.question_en: Which papers report an intercoder reliability metric together with a measured agreement value?
items.notes: Traverses the annotator-agreement subtemplate beyond the guideline-focused items from batch 1.

items.question_en: Which papers report annotator identity together with level of application domain experience?
items.notes: Focuses on annotator characterization rather than counts or agreement outcomes.

items.question_en: Which annotation schemes are paired with which scheme establishment values?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?annotationScheme ?annotationSchemeLabel ?schemeEstablishment ?schemeEstablishmentLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181036 ?annotationScheme .
  ?annotationScheme orkgp:P181037 ?schemeEstablishment .
  OPTIONAL { ?annotationScheme rdfs:label ?annotationSchemeLabel . }
  OPTIONAL { ?schemeEstablishment rdfs:label ?schemeEstablishmentLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?annotationSchemeLabel ?schemeEstablishmentLabel
items.notes: Explores the internal structure of annotation schemes rather than dataset metadata itself.

items.question_en: Which papers report both a baseline comparison type and a baseline comparison detail in the same evaluation?
items.notes: Targets the full nested baseline-comparison structure instead of only one of its child properties.

items.question_en: Which validation procedures are paired with more than one distinct evaluation metric?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?validationProcedure ?validationProcedureLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?metric) AS ?metricCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P181050 ?validationProcedure ;
              orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  OPTIONAL { ?validationProcedure rdfs:label ?validationProcedureLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?validationProcedure ?validationProcedureLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?metric) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?metricCount) ?validationProcedureLabel
items.notes: Aggregates metrics under shared validation procedures to expose broader evaluation diversity.

items.question_en: Which papers report an evaluation metric together with a baseline comparison detail, but no baseline comparison type?
items.notes: Uses a precise nested absence condition within baseline comparison while still requiring metric evidence.

items.question_en: Which publication years contain papers that report baseline comparison types?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?year (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
         orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P181051 ?baselineComparison .
  ?baselineComparison orkgp:P181052 ?baselineType .
}
GROUP BY ?year
ORDER BY ?year
items.notes: Adds a year-based slice over the baseline-comparison branch of evaluation.

items.question_en: Which papers report more than one distinct validation procedure in the same evaluation?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?validationProcedure) AS ?validationProcedureCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P181050 ?validationProcedure .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?validationProcedure) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?validationProcedureCount) ?paperLabel
items.notes: Counts repeated validation evidence within one evaluation node.

items.question_en: Which baseline comparison types co-occur with which evaluation metrics, and how many papers report each pairing?
items.notes: Builds metric-baseline pair counts instead of single-property evaluation summaries.

items.question_en: Do any papers report an evaluation with a validation procedure but without any evaluation metric?
items.notes: Uses a same-evaluation NOT EXISTS condition to test incomplete metric reporting.

items.question_en: Which papers report a release URL together with a release location type and a release format?
items.notes: Covers the fully populated release subtree rather than isolated release attributes.

items.question_en: Which papers report a release location type but no release format?
items.notes: Models an incomplete release record using a missing nested child property.

items.question_en: Which papers report a documentation type together with a release URL?
items.notes: Connects documentation evidence to a concrete release endpoint for the same implementation.

items.question_en: Which papers report either a release URL or a dataset URL, and which kind of URL is reported?
items.notes: Uses UNION to distinguish two different URL-bearing resource branches under one answer schema.

items.question_en: Which papers report both a documentation type and a methodology license type?
items.notes: Keeps the focus on implementation-support resources rather than release packaging itself.

items.question_en: Which combinations of dataset natural language and evaluation metric are shared by at least two papers?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?naturalLanguage ?naturalLanguageLabel ?metric ?metricLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  OPTIONAL { ?naturalLanguage rdfs:label ?naturalLanguageLabel . }
  OPTIONAL { ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?naturalLanguage ?naturalLanguageLabel ?metric ?metricLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) >= 2)
ORDER BY DESC(?paperCount) ?naturalLanguageLabel ?metricLabel
items.notes: Compares a dataset property with an evaluation property across papers and filters to shared patterns.

items.question_en: Which combinations of approach type and release format are shared by at least two papers?
items.notes: Compares methodology characterization against release packaging at the cross-paper level.

items.question_en: Which combinations of guideline availability and conflict resolution are shared by at least two papers?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?guidelineAvailability ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel ?conflictResolution ?conflictResolutionLabel
       (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181036 ?annotationScheme ;
                     orkgp:P181041 ?annotatorAgreement .
  ?annotationScheme orkgp:P181038 ?guidelineAvailability .
  ?annotatorAgreement orkgp:P181044 ?conflictResolution .
  OPTIONAL { ?guidelineAvailability rdfs:label ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel . }
  OPTIONAL { ?conflictResolution rdfs:label ?conflictResolutionLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?guidelineAvailability ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel ?conflictResolution ?conflictResolutionLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) >= 2)
ORDER BY DESC(?paperCount) ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel ?conflictResolutionLabel
items.notes: Crosses two distinct annotation subbranches and keeps only combinations shared across multiple papers.

items.question_en: Which RE-task and evaluation-metric pairs are shared by at least two papers?
items.notes: Compares research-problem framing with evaluation practice across papers.

items.question_en: Which combinations of data source domain and baseline comparison type are reported, and which papers belong to each combination?
items.notes: Builds a cross-region comparison between dataset provenance and evaluation baselines.

items.question_en: Which papers report both an annotation scheme and a validation procedure, and which papers report only one of the two?
items.notes: Uses a three-way UNION to separate full co-occurrence from one-sided coverage.

items.question_en: How many papers report each release format?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?releaseFormat ?releaseFormatLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P181049 ?releaseFormat .
  OPTIONAL { ?releaseFormat rdfs:label ?releaseFormatLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?releaseFormat ?releaseFormatLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?paperCount) ?releaseFormatLabel
items.notes: Simple corpus-level count over release-format values for the implementation subtree.

items.question_en: Which publication years have the fewest papers that report a dataset URL?
items.notes: Uses a nested MIN subquery to identify the least represented publication years for dataset URLs.

items.question_en: For each venue, how many distinct evaluation metrics are reported across its papers?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?venue ?venueLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?metric) AS ?metricCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  OPTIONAL { ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?venue ?venueLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?metricCount) ?venueLabel
items.notes: Aggregates evaluation diversity at venue level instead of paper or year level.
